[?25h[?25l[?25l[?25l[?25l[mCodex CLI[4;1HIf no subcommand is specified, options will be forwarded to the interactive CLI.[1m[4m[6;1HUsage:[22m[24m codex [OPTIONS] [PROMPT]
       codex [OPTIONS] <COMMAND> [ARGS][1m[4m[9;1HCommands:[22m[24m
  [1mexec[22m         Run Codex non-interactively [aliases: e]
  [1mreview[22m       Run a code review non-interactively
  [1mlogin[22m        Manage login
  [1mlogout[22m       Remove stored authentication credentials
  [1mmcp[22m          Manage external MCP servers for Codex
  [1mplugin[22m       Manage Codex plugins
  [1mmcp-server[22m   Start Codex as an MCP server (stdio)
  [1mapp-server[22m   [experimental] Run the app server or related tooling
  [1mapp[22m          Launch the Codex desktop app (opens the app installer if missing)
  [1mcompletion[22m   Generate shell completion scripts
  [1msandbox[22m      Run commands within a Codex-provided sandbox
  [1mdebug[22m        Debugging tools
  [1mapply[22m        Apply the latest diff produced by Codex agent as a `git apply` to your local working tree [aliases: a]
  [1mresume[22m       Resume a previous interactive session (picker by default; use --last to continue the most recent)
  [1mfork[22m         Fork a previous interactive session (picker by default; use --last to fork the most recent)
  [1mcloud[22m        [EXPERIMENTAL] Browse tasks from Codex Cloud and apply changes locally
  [1mexec-server[22m  [EXPERIMENTAL] Run the standalone exec-server service
  [1mfeatures[22m     Inspect feature flags
  [1mhelp[22m         Print this message or the help of the given subcommand(s)[1m[4m[30;1HArguments:[?25h[22m[24m
  [PROMPT]
          Optional user prompt to start the session

checks.name: claude-in-pty-help
checks.excerpt:
[?9001h[?1004h[?25l[2J[m[HPS E:\vibecoding\DeepWork\tech-validation>[1C]0;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\powershell.exe[?25h[?25l[93mclaude [90m--help
[?25h[?25l[?25l[?25l[?25l[?25l[?25l[?25l[?25l[?25l[?25l[?25l[?25l[?25l[?25l[?25l[?25l[?25l[?25l[?25l[?25l[?25l[?25l[?25l[?25l[?25l[?25l[?25l[?25l[?25l[?25l[?25l[?25l[?25l[?25l[?25l[?25l[?25l[?25l[mUsage: claude [options] [command] [prompt][4;1HClaude Code - starts an interactive session by default, use -p/--print for non-interactive output[6;1HArguments:
  prompt                                            Your prompt[9;1HOptions:
  --add-dir <directories...>                        Additional directories to allow tool access to
  --agent <agent>                                   Agent for the current session. Overrides the 'agent' setting.
  --agents <json>                                   JSON object defining custom agents (e.g. '{"reviewer":
                                                    {"description": "Reviews code", "prompt": "You are a code
                                                    reviewer"}}')
  --allow-dangerously-skip-permissions              Enable bypassing all permission checks as an option, without it
                                                    being enabled by default. Recommended only for sandboxes with no
                                                    internet access.
  --allowedTools, --allowed-tools <tools...>        Comma or space-separated list of tool names to allow (e.g.
                                                    "Bash(git *) Edit")
  --append-system-prompt <prompt>                   Append a system prompt to the default system prompt
  --bare                                            Minimal mode: skip hooks, LSP, plugin sync, attribution,
                                                    auto-memory, background prefetches, keychain reads, and CLAUDE.md
